name: Momentive Global Inc.
description: Momentive Global Inc., formerly known as SVMK Inc., is a prominent provider of cloud-based software solutions, best known for its flagship product, SurveyMonkey. The company offers a comprehensive SaaS platform that enables individuals and organizations to design, distribute, and analyze surveys to gather actionable insights. Headquartered in San Mateo, California, Momentive focuses on delivering experience management solutions, including customer experience (CX) and market research tools. By leveraging data-driven analytics, the company helps businesses improve their decision-making processes and enhance engagement with their customers, employees, and target audiences globally.
